name: media-flow
title: MediaFlow
description: Universal now-playing monitor and audio device switcher for macOS.
author: egor-xyz

commands.name: nowPlaying
commands.title: Now Playing
commands.description: Current media in the menu bar

commands.name: mediaDetails
commands.title: Media Details
commands.description: Rich view of all active media sources

commands.name: searchDevices
commands.title: Audio Devices
commands.description: List and switch audio input/output devices

commands.name: nextTrack
commands.title: Next Track
commands.description: Skip to the next track on the active media source

commands.name: previousTrack
commands.title: Previous Track
commands.description: Go back to the previous track on the active media source

commands.name: togglePlayPause
commands.title: Play/Pause
commands.description: Toggle play/pause on the active media source

tools.name: control-playback
tools.title: Control Playback
tools.description: Play, pause or skip the current track

tools.name: find-similar
tools.title: Find Similar Music
tools.description: Suggest tracks similar to the current one

preferences.name: menuBarStyle
preferences.title: Menu Bar Style
preferences.description: Show icon with track title, or icon only

preferences.name: showWhenStopped
preferences.title: Visibility
preferences.label: Show menu bar icon when nothing is playing
preferences.description: Keep the icon visible while no media plays

preferences.name: maxTitleLength
preferences.title: Max Title Length
preferences.description: Truncate the menu bar title after this many characters
